title: Uniswap Flop - Dharma Vote Stopped
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that proposes multiple governance changes in a single tx

red_flags: Proposing multiple governance changes in a single tx
summary: A controversial governance proposal by Dharma aimed at lowering the quorum threshold for Uniswap proposals was rejected. While the proposal itself did not result in funds loss, the attempt highlights the risks of proposing multiple governance changes in a single tx.
